description: Create a single self-contained 1920x1080 HTML slide (inline CSS, optional inline SVG) titled 'Transformer Architecture: Encoder-Decoder Reference' in 34px bold. The slide must pack FOUR coexisting regions into the 1920x1080 frame with no overflow: (A) Left region (40% width): an inline-SVG encoder-decoder diagram with exactly 12 labeled boxes (Input Embedding, Positional Encoding, 2x Multi-Head Attention, 4x Add & Norm, Feed Forward, Masked Multi-Head Attention, Output Embedding, Linear+Softmax), each box exactly 180px wide, connected by arrows that must not cross any box label. (B) Center-right region (35% width): a 9-row x 5-column hyperparameter table (columns: Param, Base, Large, GPT-3, Notes) with a dark header row (#1a365d, white text). (C) Far-right narrow column (25% width): the attention equation Attention(Q,K,V)=softmax(QK^T/sqrt(d_k))V rendered with real superscript/subscript, plus 5 bullet notes each at most 2 lines. (D) A single-line footnote pinned to the bottom edge. All three vertical regions A/B/C must share the same top y-coordinate and the same bottom y-coordinate (equal panel heights).
requirements: No element overlaps any other element; in particular no SVG arrow passes through any box label text
All 12 diagram boxes are fully inside the slide and are each exactly 180px wide (equal width)
Regions A, B and C have the same top edge and the same bottom edge (equal panel heights, aligned)
The 9-row x 5-column table shows all 45 cells with no cell text truncated or clipped
The attention equation renders QK^T as superscript and d_k as subscript (not plain inline text)
Each of the 5 bullet notes occupies at most 2 lines and stays fully inside region C
The footnote is fully visible above the 1080px bottom edge and does not overlap regions A/B/C
No horizontal or vertical scrollbar; total content fits exactly within 1920x1080
Every text element is at least 12px
There is at least a 24px gutter between region A, region B and region C

A one-line footnote 'Pipeline processes ~2M samples/day at 99.7% uptime' sits at the bottom edge.

Every bullet point (4 per stage) is fully inside its box, no text clipped at any box edge
The 3 metric panels below the pipeline are exactly equal width and equal height
Arrows between stages are visible and do not overlap any box text

Nothing overlaps the footnote and the footnote is fully visible above the bottom edge
The pipeline row and the metric-panel row do not overlap vertically
No content crosses the 1920 right edge or the 1080 bottom edge; no scrollbar
The 6 stage boxes all have the same height (top and bottom edges aligned)
Every text element is at least 12px

description: Create a single self-contained 1920x1080 HTML slide titled 'State-of-the-Art Comparison on ImageNet' in 28px bold. The core is a dense 10-row x 7-column table (header + 9 model rows). Header row background #1a365d with white text; alternating body rows white / #f8f9fa. To the RIGHT of the table (>=24px gutter), a fixed-width legend panel explaining the 3 highlight colors used (best Top-1 green #d4edda, lowest Params blue #cfe2ff, lowest FLOPs yellow #fff3cd). A source footnote in 11px italic pinned bottom-left. Table plus legend must both fit within 1920 width with no horizontal scroll.

Spacing between cards is equal and the left/right margins from the slide edges are equal
Each icon is a perfect circle (equal width and height, not an oval)
Each card's box-shadow is visible and not clipped by an overflow:hidden container
Each card's 4px left border color matches that card's icon color
Each tag pill is pinned at the bottom of its card and fully inside the card
No description text overflows its card boundary
The 3 cards are vertically centered as a group in the area below the subtitle
All 3 cards plus spacing fit within the 1920 width with no horizontal overflow
No scrollbar and nothing crosses the 1080 bottom edge

description: Create a single self-contained 1920x1080 HTML slide titled 'Model Benchmark Scatter + Summary' in 28px bold centered. LEFT region (62% width): a scatter plot built only from HTML/CSS (no canvas, no images; inline SVG allowed) in a 1100x600 bordered plot area. X-axis 'Training Time (hours)' with ticks 0/10/20/30/40/50 and dashed grid lines; Y-axis 'Accuracy (%)' rotated 90deg with ticks 60/70/80/90/100 and grid lines. Plot 20 dots (12px circles): 6 blue #3b82f6 'Model A' (acc 85-95, time 5-15), 7 red #ef4444 'Model B' (acc 75-85, time 20-35), 7 green #22c55e 'Model C' (acc 65-78, time 35-50). A legend sits in the plot's top-right corner. RIGHT region (35% width, >=24px gutter): a 'Summary' card with a 4-row x 3-column table (Model, Mean Acc, Mean Time) plus 3 bullet takeaways (each at most 2 lines). Plot region and summary card share the same top edge.
requirements: All 20 data points are inside the plot area, positioned proportionally to the axis scales
X and Y axis tick labels align with their grid lines
The Y-axis label is rotated 90deg and does not overlap the plot or the tick labels
The legend is inside the plot's top-right corner showing all 3 models with correct colors
The clustering matches the description (A high-acc/low-time, B mid/mid, C low-acc/high-time)
The right summary card is separated by a >=24px gutter and does not overlap the plot
The 4-row x 3-column summary table and the 3 bullets are fully inside the summary card
The plot region and the summary card share the same top edge
All content fits within 1920x1080 with no scrollbar; nothing crosses the right/bottom edges
Every text element is at least 12px

description: Create a single self-contained 1920x1080 HTML slide: a title slide whose entire content GROUP is vertically centered as a whole on a white background. Group elements top-to-bottom with EXACT gaps: (1) blue rule 3px #2563eb 200px wide; (2) 40px gap; (3) title 'Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models' 44px bold #111827, 1px letter-spacing; (4) 16px gap; (5) subtitle 'Empirical Analysis of Compute-Optimal Training Strategies' 22px #4b5563; (6) 40px gap; (7) gray rule 1px #d1d5db 400px wide; (8) 32px gap; (9) authors 'Dr. Emily Zhang, Dr. Michael Torres, Dr. Aisha Patel' 18px #374151; (10) 8px gap; (11) affiliation 'DeepMind Research | Google Brain | Stanford AI Lab' 15px #6b7280; (12) 8px gap; (13) date 'NeurIPS 2025 | December 14, 2025 | Vancouver, BC' 14px italic #9ca3af; (14) 40px gap; (15) blue rule 3px #2563eb 200px wide. All lines centered. The top rule (1) and bottom rule (15) must be visually identical.
requirements: The entire element group is vertically centered on the 1920x1080 slide
Every text line and rule is horizontally centered
The three rules have exact widths 200px / 400px / 200px
The inter-element gaps match the specified pixel values (40/16/40/32/8/8/40)
The title is 44px bold with 1px letter-spacing and remains visually centered despite the spacing
Font sizes decrease in order: 44, 22, 18, 15, 14
Each text color matches its specification
The top rule (1) and bottom rule (15) are identical in width, color and thickness
The total group height does not exceed 1080; no overflow and no scrollbar
Bold / regular / italic styles are applied to the correct lines only
